title: 2023 DPA Indonesia total compensation
summary: Median annual total compensation for designers in Indonesia was Rp84,000,000, based on 27 respondents. Only the Junior IC cohort (N=15, median Rp62,000,000) meets the minimum safe disclosure threshold of 10 respondents. Mid-level IC (N=3), Senior IC (N=3), Lead/Staff/Principal IC (N=5), and Vice President (N=1) cohorts fall below that threshold, so their medians are not published.
methodology: Self-reported annual total compensation figures in local currency (IDR), including base salary, annual bonus, annual stock grants, and other compensation. Figures are self-reported and have not been independently verified. Career-level breakdowns are only published for cohorts with 10 or more respondents.
